title: Gold Slumps Amid The Spectre Of More Aggressive Rate Hikes
section_path: Gold Slumps Amid The Spectre Of More Aggressive Rate Hikes
section_path_text: Gold Slumps Amid The Spectre Of More Aggressive Rate Hikes
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets suffered further losses as mixed economic data did nothing to change expectations of further aggressive hikes by the Fed. A stronger USD also weighed on investor appetite. Gold slumped amid expectations of more aggressive rate hikes by the Fed.
